_doctrine: 13-phase Wall Street cycle. Phase is JORDAN'S call (editorial). Until he calls it, phase='Awaiting Jordan's call' and phase_source='awaiting'. Score + trend are facts and always present; phase_suggestion is the auto/brain advisory. next_move is the FORWARD prediction (brain consensus) — where the phase goes next; current phase stays the anchor.

next_move.reasoning: The coil statistics (0 of 40 windows moved ±2+ points) dominate any directional thesis, and neither brain has identified a concrete catalyst breaker to justify abandoning the HOLD default.
next_move.brains_agree: Partial — both implicitly coiled, but analyst explicitly grades HOLD with medium conviction while narrative's accumulation framing implies upward bias without stating it; the split is on interpretation of the same divergence, not on immediate action
next_move.confirmed_if: fear_greed breaks above 38 with btc_momentum_30d holding above 50 and DXY breaking below 100.5 — would signal Panic→Denial transition with risk-on legs
next_move.invalidated_if: VIX spikes above 25 with funding flipping negative and stablecoin_growth dropping below 45 — would signal deeper Panic leg, score breaking below 24
